violations.text: Lettuce salads w/chicken received at 49 degrees F. Cold foods requiring refrigeration must be received at 41 degrees F or below. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
The concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was not within required parameters. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
Deli meat sandwiches delivered at 56,58, and 59 degrees F. PIC refused delivery. Cold foods must be delivered at 41 degrees F or below. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Sanitizer solution was observed in excess of recommended limits. Sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must follow directions on label. PIC was instructed on proper use and testing of sanitizer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
Potatoes were received at 128-130 degrees F. Hot food must be received at 135 degrees F or higher. Potatoes were placed in warmer/oven to reheat. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
Cheese was received at 54-55 degrees F. Cold food must be received at 41 degrees F or below. Cheese was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
The food thermometer was nonfunctional during inspection. The District Manager was called during inspection to deliver another thermometer. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024
